response.justification: Meets the 15-year minimum experience requirement with solid technical breadth across multiple domains and infrastructure work, but lacks the core specialization in AI/ML that the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role demands. Current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is recent (April 2025) and appears implementation-focused rather than demonstrating the recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory, or director-level influence expected for this position.
strengths: 19+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and real-time systems
Demonstrated ability to architect at scale (micro-services handling millions of requests, Kubernetes deployments, high-performance systems)
Active in teaching and knowledge-sharing (workshops, public talks, open-source projects)
concerns: Limited to no prior AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms before April 2025
No evidence of strategic advisory, customer-facing strategy work, or director-level organizational influence
Resume shows senior practitioner roles with strong execution but not the strategic leadership profile expected for director-level IC
